title: spilotantha sertula
intro: Spilotantha sertula, also known as the spiny thistle, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the asteraceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Spilotantha sertula include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
